name: Margrets Black Beans
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs. dry black beans, soaked 8 hours/overnight
enough soaking water to cover an inch
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the soaked black beans, vegetable stock, and enough water to cover an inch in a large pot.
2. Add bay leaves, bell peppers, onions, garlic, cooking sherry, allspice, lemon (with seeds), and whole cloves.
3. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 1.5 hours.
4. Remove from heat and stir in the remaining ingredients.
5. Simmer for an additional 0.5-1 hour until the beans are tender.
Note: Do not add any additional ingredients or steps that were not included in the original recipe.
